name: Animal Friendship
description: Charm animal after a 6-turn binding ceremony; max 2HD per caster level total. Bound animals will follow. Train up to 6 tricks, 1wk training.
save: vs. Spell; Negates but animal acts normally

name: Detect Danger
description: Detect danger within range; scanning a 10′×10′ area: 1 turn; creature/object: 1 round

name: Entangle
description: Plants grab targets in 20′ radius. Affected creatures are entangled and cannot move
save: Save for half movement through area

name: Faerie Fire
description: Outlines creatures/objects; counters invisibility; attacks in low light +2
aoe: At 5th level, 1 m-sized object/creature; at 5th level, 2 m-sized or one 10'; at 10th level, 3 m-sized or one 15'; at 14th level, 4 m-sized or one 20' object/creature

name: Invisibility to Animals
description: Target undetectable to all animal senses

name: Locate Plant or Animal
description: Sense direction (not distance) to known specific non-magical and non-sentient plant or animal (or species)

name: Predict Weather
description: Accurately predict weather for next 12 hours

name: Speak with Animals
description: Speak with 1 type of ordinary or giant animal; reaction roll still required (and unaffected)

name: Barkskin
description: +1 AC and +1 to all non-magical saving throws

name: Create Water
description: Create 50 gallons of water, enough for 12 people and 12 mounts (+50 gal/level above 8th)

name: Cure Light Wounds
description: 1d6+1hp healed or cure paralysis
reversed: Cause Light Wounds: inflict 1d6+1hp damage on successful attack roll

name: Heat Metal
description: Damage escalates over 7 rounds: very hot (uncomfortable) -> Blistering (1d3 damage) -> searing (1d6 damage + ignites flammables) -> white hot (1d6 damage + ignites flammables + disability (hand/foot unusable 2d4 days; body weakened (half move, no attacks or spellcasting) 1d4 days: head unconscious 1d4 turns) -> searing -> blistering -> very hot

name: Obscuring Mist
description: 10′ high fog fills 10′/level radius; blocks infravision and normal vision; faint sight available for caster and any being that can see invisible. Strong winds reduce duration by

name: Produce Flame
description: Flame in hand gives 30′ light; ignites flammable objects; caster can make appear or disappear at will; can hurl for 1d6+level

name: Slow Poison
description: Poisons inflict only 1hp/turn (none if victim only has 1hp); characters killed by poison can be temporariliy revived with this spell; if a natural poison, caster has 10%/level of knowing herbal anttidote (collect in wilderness 1 turn); full effects occur when spell over (including dying again)

name: Warp Wood
description: Permanently warp 1 arrow-sized object per level (javelin = 2 arrows, bow/staff = 4 arrows); magic objects have 10% chance of being unaffected per plus
save: If object is wielded, wielder may save vs spells

name: Call Lightning
description: 1 bolt/turn, 8d6 damage; SV ½; requires outdoor storm conditions (if storm dissipates, spell ends)

name: Growth of Nature
description: Double size and damage of one animal (strength , damage, and carry weight doubled) or cause rapid plant growth (3000 square feet affected; thick thorns and vines; only very large creatures can push through
aoe: one animal or 3000 sq ft of plants

name: Hold Animal
description: Paralyse animals up to caster’s total HD; normal or giant but not magical, summoned, or sentient animals are affected

name: Protection from Poison
description: Immunity to venomous attacks or gases; +4 vs. poisonous breath weapons; revive poisoned character within 10 rounds of falling.

name: Tree Shape
description: Caster and equipment become a tree; normal senses retained; caster may end spell at will

name: Water Breathing
description: Single subject can breathe water freely without affecting their ability to breathe air
reversed: Air Breathing: single subject can breathe air freely without affecting their ability to breathe water

name: Cure Serious Wounds
description: 2d6+2hp healed
reversed: Cause Serious Wounds: inflict 2d6+2hp damage on successful attack roll

name: Dispel Magic
description: End all non-instant spells in 20′ cube; 5% chance of failure for each level difference of a magical effect cast by a higher level caster; magic items are unaffected

name: Protection from Fire and Lightning
description: Choose 1 type; 6hp/caster level of damage absorbed

name: Speak with Plants
description: Speak with normal plants or plant-based monsters; normal plants will comply if requests are ones they can understand and perform

name: Summon Animals
description: Summon animals in range with total HD up to caster’s level; may specify species; if caster under attack will flee only if morale failure

name: Temperature Control
description: Control temperature within 10′ of caster; temp can be varied up to full range of biome and season possibility

name: Commune with Nature
description: Enter a trance; Learn 1 fact per level about the surrounding area including terrain, bodies of water, plants, animals, minerals, or resident intelligent creatures; cannot be cast underground or in unnatural setting

name: Control Weather
description: Control one type of weather in radius while concentrating; clear or initiate bad weather, dry up snow or mud, create fog (visibility 20′), high winds (movement rates halved, missile fire and flight impossible, sandstorm in sandy areas), create rain (-2 to missile, mud in 3 turns, halving movement), snow (30' visibility, movement rates halved, bodies of water freeze), create tornadoes (AC0, HD12, hp54, AT 1, DMG 2d8, THAC0 10, MV 360 (120), 2HD enemies swept aside (SV vs. Death), only harmed by magic, +1d8 to flying enemies)

name: Pass Plant
description: Enter one tree and exit from another of same species with trunk large enough to hold caster
range: oak: 600yds; ash/elm/linden/yew: 360yds; other deciduous: 300yds; all others: 240yds

name: Protection from Plants and Animals
description: Caster immune to attacks from either plants or animals (caster must choose); caster can only attack via spells; vs. plants can be used to clear path through dense undergrowth

name: Transmute Rock to Mud
description: Up to 3,000 sq ft of rock becomes mud for 3d6 days; mud reduces movement by 90%
reversed: Mud to Rock: changes area of mud to rock; duration permanent

name: Wall of Thorns
description: Create dense thorny barrier; creatures in wall when conjured take 1d8+AC damage; pushing through does 1d8+AC damage per 10′; hacking away takes 4 rounds/10′; normal fire has no effect; magical fire burns away in 2 turns
aoe: Up to 1,200 sq ft, any dimensions
